zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend Adam Halsnoth於1554年出生在英國艾可可爾斯特時，他的父親Sir William Halsnoth24歲，母親Lady Agnes Marcy Styelinge24歲。他和Mary Rogers至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1639年8月27日在英國英格蘭艾可可藍納姆享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reverend Adam Halsnoth于1554年出生在英国艾可可爾斯特时，他的父亲Sir William Halsnoth24岁，母亲Lady Agnes Marcy Styelinge24岁。他和Mary Rogers至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1639年8月27日在英国英格兰艾可可藍納姆享年85岁。

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend Adam Halsnoth was born in 1554, in Colchester, Essex, England, his father, Sir William Halsnoth, was 24 and his mother, Lady Agnes Marcy Styelinge, was 24. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Mary Rogers. He died on 27 August 1639, in Cranham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend Adam Halsnoth est né en 1554, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Halsnoth, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Marcy Styelinge, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Mary Rogers. Il est décédé le 27 août 1639, à Cranham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reverend Adam Halsnoth 1554 in Colchester, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Halsnoth 24 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes Marcy Styelinge 24. Er hatte mit Mary Rogers mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. August 1639 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Cranham, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend Adam Halsnoth è nato il nel 1554 nel Colchester, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir William Halsnoth, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes Marcy Styelinge, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Mary Rogers. Morì il 27 agosto 1639, nel Cranham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend Adam Halsnothが1554年にイギリスエセックスコルチェスターで生まれた時，父Sir William Halsnothは24歳，母Lady Agnes Marcy Styelingeは24歳であった。彼はMary Rogersとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1639年8月27日にイギリスイギリスエセックスクランハムで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reverend Adam Halsnoth(이)가 1554년 영국 에세스 코체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Halsnoth(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Marcy Styelinge(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Mary Rogers(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1639년 8월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 크랜함에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend Adam Halsnoth nasceu em 1554, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Halsnoth, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Marcy Styelinge, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Mary Rogers. Ele faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1639, em Cranham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend Adam Halsnoth родился в 1554 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Halsnoth было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Marcy Styelinge, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Mary Rogers. Он умер 27 августа 1639 г. в местности кранам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reverend Adam Halsnoth nació en 1554, en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Halsnoth, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Marcy Styelinge, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Mary Rogers. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1639, en Cranham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años.
